passages.passage_text:
Directions (Q. Nos. 114-115) Read the following information carefully and answer the questions that follow.
Five men A, B, C, D and E read a newspaper. The one who reads first give it to C. The one who reads last had taken it from A. E was not the first or the last to read. There are two readers between B and A.

Directions (Q. Nos. 116-119) Answer the following questions based on the information given below.
In a sports event, six team A, B, C, D, E and F are competing against each other. Matches are scheduled in two stages. Each team plays three matches in stage I and two matches in stage II. No team plays against the same team more than once in the event, so ties are permitted in any of the matches. The observations after the competition of stage I and stage II are as given below.
Stage I
I. One team won all the three matches.
II. Two teams lost all the matches.
III. D lost to A but won against C and F.
IV. E lost to B but won against C and F.
V. B lost atleast one match.
VI. F did not play against the top team of stage I.
Stage II
I. The leader of stage I lost the next two matches.
II. One of the two teams at the bottom after stage I, won both the matches while the other lost both the matches.
III. One more team lost both the matches in stage II.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following is true regarding A?

choices.a: The person from UCO Bank faces A
choices.b: The person from Bank of Maharashtra is an immediate neighbour of A
choices.c: A faces the person who sits second to the right of R
choices.d: A is from Oriental Bank of Commerce
choices.e: A sits at one of the extreme ends of the line

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Who is seated between R and the person from PNB?

choices.a: The person from Oriental Bank of Commerce

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Who amongst the following sit at extreme ends of the rows?

choices.a: D and the person from PNB
choices.b: The persons from Indian Bank and UCO Bank
choices.c: The persons from Dena Bank and P
choices.d: The persons from Syndicate Bank and D

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Who amongst the following faces the person from Bank of Maharashtra?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: P is related to Dena Bank in the same way as B is related to PNB based on the given arrangement. Who amongst the following is D related to, following the same pattern?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Four of the following five are alike in a certain way based on the given sitting arrangement and thus form a group. Which is the one that does not belong to that group?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Who amongst the following is from Syndicate Bank?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: C is from which of the following banks?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: B passed the newspaper to whom?
